dedupePolicy: source order gps-ops then galileo; duplicate NORAD catalog ids skipped with earlier source precedence
classTagDerivation: meanMotionRevPerDay > 11 => leo; 0.9..1.1 => geo; >1.1..11 => meo; out-of-band records are outside this gate
subsetPolicy: deterministic public MEO catalog set; all gps-ops and galileo records matching the V4.13 MEO mean-motion rule are retained
renderPolicy: one current SGP4-propagated point primitive per copied TLE; no labels, paths, polylines, or orbit-history accumulation in multi-orbit-scale-points mode
licenseNote: Celestrak public GP/TLE data copied for bounded repo validation. This fixture is not ITRI authority data, live network truth, active satellite path truth, or measured performance truth.
